They're doing everything that we teach They've made themselves to be the experts They write the books or that you at least the special reports that type of stuff they take the business onto themselves I also think though that they're students right so they're studying they're studying different sales environments They're learning from everything And I think they hate losing more than they like winning or they can't stand to lose and so it Drives them to be the best those are the people that you know not only said quota, but you know You're you're banking on them right you're going to Arizona and buying the big times You're not the small timeshare when you have them on your sales force So the key is to get to them and if you get them you just take care of them You don't mess with their quotas you don't mess with their commissions You don't do all the stuff that sometimes organizations do you really really really take care of that 1% You just said something you feel a couple profound things not many not many Not many during the four hours, but a couple no again what you just mentioned. Well, one of my favorite things Dan that I've learned from you Is takeaway selling To me this is one of the most powerful strategies that that there is and not not a lot of people use it Talk about what takeaway selling is and how someone can actually use it in their business because it's crazy powerful when people have to qualify And they have they feel like they have to sell you On accepting them A lot of your Your own selling now Becomes very pro forma It becomes very relaxed
